title: What is Claude Design? Anthropic’s new AI tool rattles design software giants
summary: Anthropic’s new AI tool rattles design software giants - Storyboard18 What is Claude Design? Anthropic’s new AI tool rattles design software giants Anthropic launches Claude Design AI tool using Claude Opus 4.7, hitting Adobe and Figma stocks, offers automated brand ali
content: Anthropic launches Claude Design AI tool using Claude Opus 4.7, hitting Adobe and Figma stocks, offers automated brand aligned prototypes, pitch decks and marketing assets for existing subscribers By Storyboard18| April 19, 2026, 17:29:25 IST Follow Us Anthropic launches Claude Design AI tool, shaking Adobe and Figma as it automates polished prototypes, pitch decks and brand aligned assets for all skill levels. Anthropic has introduced a new artificial intelligence-powered design tool, Claude Design, triggering a negative market reaction for major design software firms including Adobe and Figma. The launch follows an earlier sell-off in SaaS stocks driven by Anthropic’s Claude Code, with the company now expanding its footprint into the design software segment. Claude Design, developed under the leadership of Dario Amodei, is positioned as a tool capable of generating polished visual assets such as ... Market reaction to the announcement was immediate, with Adobe Design is powered by Anthropic’s latest Claude Opus 4.7 model and is aimed at both professional designers and non-designers. Users can initiate projects by uploading files such as DOCX, PPTX or XLSX, providing images, or linking an existing codebase. The tool generates an initial draft of the requested design, which can then be refined through inline comments, direct edits or adjustable controls. It is also designed to automatically apply a company’s design system across projects, ... Anthropic stated that the system builds a design framework during onboarding by analysing a team’s existing codebase ... The company outlined several use cases for the tool, including the creation of interactive prototypes from static ... title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research
summary: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research top of page OpenAI on Thursday introduced GPT-Rosalind, an artificial intelligence model designed to enhance biology knowledge and scientific research capabilities. This launch deepens the organisation’s push into the life sciences
content: OpenAI Unveils GPT-Rosalind AI Model for Life Sciences Research top of page OpenAI on Thursday introduced GPT-Rosalind, an artificial intelligence model designed to enhance biology knowledge and scientific research capabilities. This launch deepens the organisation’s push into the life sciences field. ... The GPT-Rosalind model is named after 20th-century British scientist Rosalind Franklin. It aims to support research ... Demand for AI-powered tools to accelerate drug discovery and research has grown among pharmaceutical companies, ... The model is designed to help researchers accelerate the early stages of discovery, supporting evidence synthesis, ... tools, and suggest new experiments. GPT-Rosalind was built on OpenAI’s newest internal models. GPT-Rosalind is available as a research preview within ChatGPT, Codex, and the application programming interface for qualified customers. This access is managed through OpenAI’s trusted access deployment structure. OpenAI is also launching a free Life Sciences research plugin for Codex, which connects scientists to over 50 scientific tools and data sources. The company is collaborating with customers such as Amgen, Moderna, and Thermo Fisher Scientific, among others, to apply GPT-Rosalind across various workflows. Separately, OpenAI on Tuesday unveiled GPT-5.4-Cyber, a variant of its latest flagship model. This model is fine-tuned specifically for defensive cybersecurity work, following rival Anthropic’s introduction of its frontier AI model, Mythos. OpenAI launched GPT-Rosalind, an AI model for life sciences research. Named after British scientist Rosalind Franklin, it supports biochemistry, drug discovery, and translational medicine. content: Google DeepMind Launches Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS With 200+ Audio Tags - AI - Product Launch - Google - Voice AI By AI Bot· April 16, 2026 Loading the Text to Speech Audio Player... Google DeepMind launched Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS on April 15, 2026, its most expressive text-to-speech model to date, giving developers fine-grained control over vocal style, pacing, and emotion through a new system of inline audio tags. The model is available in preview via the Gemini API, Google AI Studio, Vertex AI, and through Google Vids for ... - More than 200 audio tags let creators direct delivery with simple bracketed commands like [whispered], [excited], or ... - Native multi-speaker dialogue for podcasts, audiobooks, and conversational agents - Support for more than 70 languages with localized accent control, including American "Valley" and "Southern," plus ... - Elo score of 1,211 on the Artificial Analysis TTS leaderboard, placing it in the most attractive quality-to-cost ... The model identifier on the Gemini API is`gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview` and it only produces audio output. Unlike previous TTS systems that required complex markup, Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS interprets natural-language direction placed ... Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS sits alongside the previously released Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, which handles real-time ... content: Adobe launches Firefly AI assistant, Claude integration included Adobe launches Firefly AI assistant with Anthropic Claude integration TL;DR - Adobe released Firefly AI assistant ... - The same capabilities are available to Anthropic Claude users via a connector to Adobe, though commercial terms are ... - The launch sharpens the contest between Adobe’s enterprise-safe AI positioning and the flood of low-cost generative ... Adobe has released Firefly AI assistant, a new agent that takes orders from human creative professionals and autonomously orchestrates Photoshop, Illustrator and Premiere Pro to deliver the requested output. The company announced the release on 15 April alongside a connector that makes the same capabilities available to users of Anthropic’s Claude model— though Adobe did not disclose the ... Firefly is the latest iteration of Adobe’s proprietary AI programme, launched in 2023, which the company emphasises is ...
